revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「20世紀の[[プロテスタント]]信者に関するカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:20th-century Protestants}} Category:プロテスタント…」
[[Category:20世紀のキリスト教]]を除去; [[Category:20世紀のキリスト教徒]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:20世紀のプロテスタント信者]] [[ar:Category:بروتستانتيون في القرن 20]] [[commons:Category:20th-century Protestants]] [[fa:Category:پروتستان‌های سده ۲۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité de la religion protestante au XXe siècle]] [[ko:Category:20세기 개신교도]] [[tr:Category:20. yüzyılda Protestanlar]] [[zh:Category:20世紀新教徒]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Tetsu_Katayama]].

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
